timer.hintActive: Stay calm. Check each step systematically.
timer.hintExpired: Call {{emergencyNumber}} immediately and request a Silver Alert

wearing.label: What are they wearing?
wearing.placeholder: e.g., Blue jacket, gray pants, white sneakers

home_search.title: Search home thoroughly
home_search.description: Check every room, closet, under beds, bathrooms, garage, basement, sheds
home_search.hint: People often seek small, quiet spaces

outside_immediate.title: Check outside areas
outside_immediate.description: Yard, porches, paths, driveways, inside vehicles (locked or unlocked)

neighbors.title: Alert neighbors
neighbors.description: Show photo, ask them to call if seen. Check their yards too.

radius_search.title: Search 1-1.5 mile radius
radius_search.description: Most people are found within this distance from home

high_risk.title: Check high-risk areas first
high_risk.description: Water (pools, ponds, streams), wooded areas, ditches, busy roads

familiar_places.title: Search familiar places
familiar_places.description: Former home, church, old workplace, favorite walking routes

call_911.title: Call {{emergencyNumber}}
call_911.description: If not found within 15 minutes, call immediately

silver_alert.title: Request Silver/Feather Alert
silver_alert.description: Ask {{emergencyNumber}} dispatcher about activating state alert program

share_info.title: Share relevant personal details
share_info.description: Share useful details (appearance, routines, communication preferences)

coordinate.title: Coordinate search efforts
coordinate.description: Assign areas to helpers, avoid duplicating coverage

document.title: Document everything
document.description: Note times, areas checked, people contacted for responders

tips.title: When you find them
tips.body:
• Approach calmly from the front
• Speak slowly with short sentences
• Give time to respond
• Offer to walk with them
• Don't argue or correct

smsMessage: URGENT: {{name}} is missing. Last seen {{time}}. {{wearing}}Please help search or call if you see them.

found.title: Found!
found.message: Great news! Remember to use calm, reassuring language. Offer water and rest.

leave.title: Leave Emergency Search?
leave.message: The timer will continue in the background. You can return to resume.

noContacts.title: No Contacts
noContacts.message: Add emergency contacts to send alerts.
